Required field – Defines the business logo displayed in the payment link.

Provide a valid image URL that will be used as the default logo for the business.

Validations:

Maximum file size: up to 512KB
Minimum resolution: 128x128 pixels
Supported formats: square, rectangle, or circular images

The configured logo will be automatically applied to all payment links created by the business.

formdata.description: Required field - credit card token .

A different commission than the regular commission Meshulam has. Example: 2.5.
Required field - the given value in the param "recurringDebitId" from the respons of the first premiume recurring payment  payment
optional - Group identifier for the payment- if you send a value in this field, then a check will be made if there is a succesful payment with this value,  then the request will be rejected .

Required field - Unique identifier for the request - if we send a value in this field, then a check will be made that this is the first time we see this value for the business. If it finds that a request has been sent with this ID, then the current request will be rejected outright regardless of the status of the first request with this ID.
